title: Pre-Chamber Nozzle Insert
description: Custom M14x1.25-to-M10x1.0 spark-plug pre-chamber / jet-ignition nozzle insert. Reverse-engineered starter CAD with BOSL2 helical threads, selectable original/corrected hex and collar dimensions, conical nozzle tip, 2.5 mm axial orifice, and angled 2.5/1.0 mm side jet holes. SCAD source included alongside the pre-rendered metal GLB.
author: Reverse-engineered starter CAD
